title: Backlog
description: Task definitions, dependencies, and lifecycle status for all work items.

next_task_seq.description: Optional global counter for the next docs/backlog task number.

TaskStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a task. 'released' is final and immutable.

task_type.description: Task category used for worker/reviewer routing.

priority.description: Optional dispatch priority. Defaults to normal when omitted.

delegated_by.description: Agent id (or human) that delegated this task.

parent_task_ref.description: Optional parent task for follow-up items (for example, review/refactor chains).

required_capabilities.description: Capability tags required on worker agent for this task.

required_provider.description: When set, only agents with a matching provider field are eligible for this task.

model.description: Optional model override for the worker session. When set, takes precedence over pool defaults.

depends_on.description: task_refs that must reach 'done' or 'released' before this task can be claimed.

acceptance_criteria.description: Checklist items used in the task envelope sent to agents.

review_level.description: Review intensity. none=self-review only, light=1 combined reviewer, full=2 reviewers (critic+integrator). Default: full.

merge_strategy.description: Merge strategy. direct=worktree merge, pr=pull request. Overrides coordinator config.

attempt_count.description: Number of times this task has been dispatched and subsequently failed or expired. Auto-blocked after reaching MAX_ATTEMPTS.

requeue_eligible_after.description: ISO timestamp before which the task scheduler must not re-dispatch this task. Set on requeue to enforce exponential backoff.

owner.description: Agent assigned to execute this task.

ref.description: Feature slug — first component of all child task_refs.
